news.title: Samsung targets 1nm production by 2030, challenges TSMC with new chiplet technology
news.description: Samsung Electronics is aiming to launch its 1nm semiconductor process by 2030 as part of a direct technological competition with rival TSMC. The move seeks to secure leadership in the next-generation semiconductor market.

news.title: Memory chip shortage drives surge in China's used phone chip market
news.description: The used mobile phone recycling market in China has recently heated up, with even non-functional old phones being collected at significantly higher prices than before. This surge is driven by a severe global shortage of consumer-grade memory chips.

news.description: Chinese GPU developer Moore Threads has secured a CNY660 million (approx. US$95.5 million) contract to supply its KUAE intelligent computing cluster, marking a shift from standalone GPUs to large-scale AI training infrastructure.

clusters.title: Semiconductors
clusters.summary: This article discusses various aspects related to semiconductors including Apple's upcoming MacBook Pro with M5 chip, 'The Thinking Machine' work in higher education, and the growth of the global foundry market.

stocks.ai_explanation: TSM is a leading supplier of semiconductors and components. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
AMD is a major player in the semiconductor industry, particularly in CPU design. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
ASML is a Dutch multinational corporation specializing in advanced lithography systems used in semiconductor manufacturing. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
Intel Corporation is a leader in microprocessors and integrated circuits. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
Qualcomm Inc., a subsidiary of Intel, designs and manufactures mobile processors. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.

disclaimer: Educational use only. Not financial advice.
